title: Michael B. Jordan Oscars 2026 Best Actor for Sinners
text: Michael B. Jordan won the Best Actor Oscar at the 2026 Academy Awards for his role in Sinners. His victory marks his first Oscar nomination and win. Jordan's performance as dual roles of Smoke and Stack, twin brothers in the supernatural drama directed by Ryan Coogler, earned him widespread acclaim throughout awards season. The win came after Jordan's earlier victory at the Actor Awards (SAG-AFTRA), where he defeated Timothée Chalamet in an upset that reset the race. Jordan's momentum carried through to the Oscars, where he claimed the award in a competitive race against Chalamet, Leonardo DiCaprio, Ethan Hawke, and Wagner Moura. The Sinners film itself was nominated for a record 16 Oscars, making it one of the most nominated films in Academy Awards history. The film's success reflects both the strength of Jordan's performance and the broader impact of Ryan Coogler's direction and the film's production design and cinematography.
